overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 featuring a character in a brown leather jacket and cowboy hat exploring a rugged mountain environment. The character walks through a rocky canyon toward a cascading waterfall with a wooden railway trestle overhead, then transitions onto a forested hillside trail with dense pine woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon with waterfall and mountain stream

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a rocky path beside a rushing mountain stream toward a tall waterfall

entered.detail: tall white waterfall cascading down the rocky canyon wall at the end of the path
steep grey rock face forming the left boundary of the canyon
steep grey rock face forming the right boundary of the canyon
fast-flowing river with white water rapids running alongside the path
large wooden railway trestle bridge spanning high above the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon toward a prominent waterfall. A rushing mountain stream flows on the left while steep rock walls enclose the path. High above, a wooden railway trestle bridge spans the canyon gap. The environment is overcast with sparse vegetation and gravel terrain underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested hillside trail with pine woodland

events.description: character turns away from the waterfall and ascends into a grassy hillside forest

agents.ego_description: walking up a grassy slope and continuing along a winding dirt path through dense pine forest

entered.detail: steep slope covered in tall green grass and low shrubs
narrow dirt trail winding through the pine forest
tall pine trees with reddish bark forming a dense woodland
large grey boulder sitting beside the path
small rustic wooden building partially visible through the trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the rocky canyon to a forested hillside as the character turns away from the waterfall. The path becomes a dirt trail through dense pine forest with tall grass on the slopes. A wooden cabin appears in the distance on the left as the character continues walking through the woodland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a stark, rocky canyon into a lush, forested hillside. It begins with the character walking along a gravel path toward a prominent waterfall, flanked by a rushing mountain stream and steep rock walls beneath a high wooden railway trestle. As the character turns away from the falls, the gray, overcast canyon environment gradually gives way to a dirt trail winding through dense pine woodland. The scene then expands across slopes of tall grass, shifting from the enclosed stone corridor to an open forest before finally revealing a distant wooden cabin nestled among the trees.
